info.title: University Management API
info.description: REST API for the Laravel 12 University Management System. All protected endpoints require a Sanctum Bearer token obtained from POST /api/auth/login.

post.summary: Log in and receive a Sanctum token

get.summary: List students not yet enrolled in the course
List students enrolled in the course

post.summary: Enroll multiple students in a course
Validate student assignments for schedule conflicts

get.summary: List instructors not yet assigned to the course
List instructors assigned to the course

post.summary: Assign an instructor to a course (single instructor enforced)
Enroll a student in a course

patch.summary: Update a student's grade for a course

get.summary: Get a student's master academic report

post.summary: Build a custom master report with selected columns

get.summary: Search users by name using Elasticsearch
get.description: Full-text search on the users index. Falls back to database LIKE search when Elasticsearch is unavailable.

sanctum.description: Laravel Sanctum token authentication. Obtain a token via POST /api/auth/login then enter it here (without the "Bearer " prefix — Swagger UI adds that automatically).
